document_info.prepared_by: Texas Department of Insurance (Analyst ID: RA-2930)

coverages_discussed.notes: Experience Modification Factor 0.94 effective 05/01/2025 to 05/01/2026. Total payroll $16,260,471. Expected Losses (E) $361,806. Risk ID: 201435-1808. Rating Plan: Large Risk. Interstate Rating: No.

positives: Final Experience Modification Factor of 0.94, indicating below-average losses relative to industry peers
Actual Excess Losses (Ae) of $0, indicating absence of catastrophic individual claims across the experience period
No excess losses recorded in the visible 2021-2022 policy year
Computed modification factor of 0.9400 results in a premium credit for the insured
concerns: 8 claims recorded in policy year 2021-2022 with total incurred losses of $56,343
Actual Primary Losses (Ap) of $92,945 across the full experience period exceed the single visible policy year, implying additional loss years
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Policy year 2021-2022: 8 claims, total paid $56,343, total incurred $56,343, primary losses $56,343, excess losses $0. Full experience period aggregate: Actual Primary Losses (Ap) $92,945, Actual Excess Losses (Ae) $0, Expected Excess Losses (Ee) $422,385, Expected Losses (E) $361,806. Ballast Value (B) $29,114, Weighting Value (W) 0.419. Numerator $367,465, Denominator $390,920, yielding computed modification factor of 0.9400.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Texas Department of Insurance Experience Rating Worksheet for Hill Country Hospitality Partners, LLC. Carrier: Hallmark Insurance Group. Risk ID: 201435-1808. Final Experience Modification Factor of 0.94 effective 05/01/2025 through 05/01/2026, approved 03/15/2026 by Analyst RA-2930. Rating Plan: Large Risk. Interstate Rating: No.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Restaurant - NOC operations under Class Code 9082 in Texas. Class 9082 payroll: $3,678,800 with expected loss rate of 1.5500, expected losses of $57,021, and D-Ratio of 0.280. Total payroll across all classifications: $16,260,471. Total expected losses across all classifications (current policy year): $239,205.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Policy year 2021-2022: 8 claims, total paid $56,343, total incurred $56,343, all classified as primary losses, excess losses $0. Experience period totals: Actual Primary Losses (Ap) $92,945; Actual Excess Losses (Ae) $0; Expected Excess Losses (Ee) $422,385; Ballast Value (B) $29,114; Weighting Value (W) 0.419. Rating formula: Mod = (Ap + W x Ae + (1-W) x Ee + B) / (E + B). Numerator: $367,465; Denominator: $390,920; Computed Modification Factor: 0.9400; Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.94.
